notes:
Supports PCL5e/6 and PostScript. Set PostScript emulation to default.
8MB RAM (could be more for graphics), serial, parallel and optional network interface.
1200x600 dpi is default resolution. Set it to "1200 (fine)" for real 1200 dpi.
Use the Kyocera PPD file for PostScript, Instructions
Use ljet4 for PCL5e but PCL5e is limited to 600dpi
In case of duplex option use ljet4d for PCL5e and duplex
Using pxlmono (PCL6) may be the fastest way to get good printouts.

Maximum paper width: 8.5 inches / 21.6 cm (Standard format printer)

Printing engine speed: 14 pages/min

Consumables/Refills: toner
